title: assign_guardian
description: Assign a guardian/parent to a student. Students can self-assign (student_id inferred from caller). Teachers and domain authorities must provide both IDs. Supports multiple guardians per student.

guardian_id.description: User ID or display name of the guardian.

student_id.description: User ID or display name of the student. Optional for student callers (defaults to self), required for teacher/DA callers.
